title: Every Famous Car Brand That FAILED in Formula 1 Explained in 14 Minutes
description:
Formula 1 isn’t just about speed — it’s about survival.
Some of the BIGGEST car brands in the world tried to conquer F1… and failed spectacularly.

In this video, we break down the shocking Formula 1 failures of:

title: F1 TESTING EXPLAINED: Why the Fastest Lap is a LIE! 🤫🏎️
description:
Don't be fooled by the Bahrain timing screens! 🏁 In this video, we dive deep into how F1 Winter Testing actually works. From fuel loads to engine mapping and "sandbagging," I’ll explain why the record times you see don’t tell the full story for the 2026 season.

We analyze:

The "Sandbagging" strategy 🎒
Fuel levels & weight impact ⛽
Why teams hide their true pace 🔴

title: F1 2026 Regulation Explained | Key Changes | Full Overview
description:

The 2026 Formula 1 regulations represent the most significant rule change since the hybrid era began in 2014. This video provides a comprehensive technical analysis of every major change — aerodynamics, power unit, chassis, and safety.

title: 2026 F1 Engine & Battery Deployement Explained (MGU-K)
description:
F1 2026 just introduced one tiny word in the regulations — “pending” — and it completely changes how drivers use the throttle on corner exit.

In this video I break down what a power-limited pending period actually means in driver language, why the car no longer gives a sudden hybrid “kick”, and how the 150kW rule forces drivers to commit to throttle earlier instead of waiting for a boost moment.

You’ll learn:
• What “power-limited” vs “traction-limited” really feels like in the car
• Why the b
